meaning: n.[动]鼬鼠,黄鼠狼,狡猾的人,告密者,含糊话vi.狡辩,躲避,告密,含糊其词vt.抽掉(词语)的含义
examples: He's now trying to weasel out of our agreement.
Fox, badger, and weasel are regularly seen here.
He went straight for the Chief Weasel.
As a result, weasel-words can destroy the effectiveness of an immunity or safe harbor.
Candid cameras filmed motorists trying to weasel out of fines with bribes or threats.
